chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD R.A. No. 156 of 2006 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of C.M.A-1281 of 2016. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2019. Mr. Parkash Lal Jethanand, Advocate for Respondent No.1. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G. = Mr. Kamran Baig Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro Advocate for the Applicant on the ground, latter learned counsel is on general adjournment. He also files statement dated 17.10.2019 on his behalf, which is jointly signed by counsels for the Applicant as well Respondent No.1, same is hereby taken on record. Through this statement, both the learned counsel seek withdrawal of present civil revision application on the ground, parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and have entered into compromise. Learned AAG after putting his counter signature on said statement has recorded no objection for withdrawal of instant revision application. Accordingly, instant civil revision application, in view of joint statement filed by the counsels for Applicant and Respondent No.1 as well no objection extended by learned AAG Sindh, is hereby dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE S
